segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع إِنَّ اَللَّهَ لَمْ يُؤْمِنِ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ مِنْ بَلاَيَا اَلدُّنْيَا وَ لَكِنْ آمَنَهُ مِنَ اَلْعَمَى فِي اَلْآخِرَةِ وَ مِنَ اَلشَّقَاءِ يَعْنِي عَمَى اَلْبَصَرِ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ ع إِنَّ اَللَّهَ لَمْ يُؤْمِنِ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ مِنْ بَلاَيَا اَلدُّنْيَا وَ لَكِنْ آمَنَهُ مِنَ اَلْعَمَى فِي اَلْآخِرَةِ وَ مِنَ اَلشَّقَاءِ يَعْنِي عَمَى اَلْبَصَرِ .

segments: (The same previous series of relaters)… from Mohammed bin Ahmed from Muawiya bin Ammar that Abu Abdullah (a) said: Allah has not insured the believers against the worldly misfortunes. In fact, He insures them against the blindness in the Hereafterand the unhappiness –i.e. sightlessness.
en.badr-shahin.text: (The same previous series of relaters)… from Mohammed bin Ahmed from Muawiya bin Ammar that Abu Abdullah (a) said: Allah has not insured the believers against the worldly misfortunes. In fact, He insures them against the blindness in the Hereafterand the unhappiness –i.e. sightlessness.

narratorChain.raw: وَ بِهَذَا اَلْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ
